---
title: "ML & LLM Integration"
description: "MOFA2/DIABLO multi-omics integration combined with XGBoost + SHAP redictive modeling, VAE benchmarking, and LLM-based interpretation."
image: "/images/Phase 5.png"

---

## Overview

Unified phase combining unsupervised multi-omics factor analysis (MOFA2, DIABLO) with supervised machine learning (XGBoost + SHAP), a VAE benchmark (expected to underperform classical methods at small N), and an LLM-based PubMed RAG interpretation agent.

## Part A: Multi-Omics Factor Analysis

*Coming soon.*

## Part B: Supervised ML & AI Interpretation

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
